zh.Codnor, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾可德諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Gray Lord of Broxmouth於大約1305年出生在英國蘇格蘭洛包爾時，他的父親David Gray28歲，母親Lady Christian Graves24歲。他和Alice de L'Isle至少有3個兒子。他去世於大約1376年在蘇格蘭金加迪爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.Codnor, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾可德諾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Gray Lord of Broxmouth于大约1305年出生在英国苏格兰洛包爾时，他的父亲David Gray28岁，母亲Lady Christian Graves24岁。他和Alice de L'Isle至少有3个儿子。他去世于大约1376年在苏格兰金加迪爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: McGreevy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Seamus, Brendan.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Riabhaigh, a patronymic from the personal name Riabhach ‘brindled, grizzled’. Compare Reavey and Creevy 2.

variants.name: Grayer
meanings: English (southern): nickname from Middle English grei ‘gray’ (see Gray ) + her ‘hair’.

variants.name: Grays
meanings: English (Durham): variant of Gray , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or of Grace .

variants.name: Grice
meanings: English (Midlands): from Middle English grice, grise ‘pig’ (Old Norse gríss), probably a nickname or a metonymic occupational name for a swineherd.
English: nickname for a gray-haired man, from Middle English grice, gris ‘gray’ (Old French gris, apparently of ancient Germanic origin, and probably a distant cognate of Gray 1).
Possibly also an Americanized form of German   Greis  .

variants.name: Grey
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Gray Lord of Broxmouth was born about 1305, in Roxburghshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, David Gray, was 28 and his mother, Lady Christian Graves, was 24. He had at least 3 sons with Alice de L'Isle. He died about 1376, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Gray Lord of Broxmouth est né environ 1305, à Roxburghshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, David Gray, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Christian Graves, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Alice de L'Isle. Il est décédé environ 1376, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Gray Lord of Broxmouth um 1305 in Roxburghshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Gray 28 und seine Mutter Lady Christian Graves 24. Er hatte mit Alice de L'Isle mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb um 1376 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Kincardineshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Gray Lord of Broxmouth è nato il circa 1305 nel Roxburghshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, David Gray, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Christian Graves, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Alice de L'Isle. Morì circa 1376, nel Kincardineshire, Scotland, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Gray Lord of Broxmouthが約1305年にイギリススコットランドロクスブルグhシュアイアで生まれた時，父David Grayは28歳，母Lady Christian Gravesは24歳であった。彼はAlice de L'Isleとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は約1376年にスコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Gray Lord of Broxmouth(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 스코틀랜드 록스버그h실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Gray(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Christian Graves(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Alice de L'Isle(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1376년 스컷랜드 킨카딘실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Gray Lord of Broxmouth nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Roxburghshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, David Gray, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Christian Graves, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Alice de L'Isle. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1376, em Kincardineshire, Scotland, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Gray Lord of Broxmouth родился около 1305 г. в местности роксбургшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени David Gray было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Christian Graves, 24. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Alice de L'Isle. Он умер около 1376 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия в возрасте 73 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos con Alice de L'Isle. Murió aproximadamente 1376, en Kincardineshire, Scotland, a la edad de 73 años.
